assertions.text: [rubric-1] Identifies CLI (src/cli/index.ts) and API (src/api/index.ts) as separate entry points
assertions.evidence: The candidate explicitly identifies `src/cli/index.ts` as the CLI entry point and `src/api/index.ts` as the API entry point.

assertions.text: [rubric-2] Tests or verifies the feature through both entry points
assertions.evidence: The candidate explains that verification is pending because the feature is not yet fully implemented or the requirements are unclear. While it identifies the strategy needed, it does not actually perform any tests or verification steps through the CLI or API.

assertions.text: [rubric-3] Does not claim verification is complete after testing only one mode
assertions.evidence: The candidate clearly states that testing must cover both CLI and API entry points and explicitly identifies that verification has not been performed yet, thus not claiming completion.
